title: babiana scariosa
intro: Babiana scariosa, also known as the Rough Baboon Flower or Rough Babiana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is a bulbous perennial that produces showy flowers and is commonly found in the mountainous regions of southern Africa. Babiana scariosa has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
